titleStmt.title: SII 26.414: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 414. (A.R. No. 393 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the verandah round the same shrine.

It records a sale of 1,000 kuḻi of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi for a sum of 35 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟpaṇam by the members of the sabhai of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēśam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, named Ātrayaṉ Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ, Aruṇagiri-bhaṭṭaṉ, his younger brother Tavappiḷḷai and others. The land was sold to the merchant Uyyavandāṉ Tittikkāḍuvāṉ of Iṉṉambar, a resident of Śiṟṟiṅgūr itself, who had endowed it to provide for food offerings and lamp to the shrine of the god Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyār built by him in the northern prākāra of the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavanāyaṉār of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmar tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya
devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu malāṭākiya jalanātavaḷaṇāṭṭuk kuṟukkai
kkūṟṟattu brahmadecam ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavanā
yaṉār vaṭaprakārattu Ivvūr viyāpārikaḷil Iṉṉampar Uṭaiyāṉ
Uyyavantāṉ tittikkāṭuvāṉ Eṟi Aruḷappaṇṇiṉa nāyaṉār Aḻakiyati
rucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārku Amutupaṭiyum veñcaṉattukkum tiruviḷakkum Iv
vūr sapaiyāril Ātrayaṉ nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Aruṇakiripaṭṭaṉum Ivar ta
mpiyāna tavappiḷḷaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum tā caṇṭecurapperuvilaiyāka
tittikkāṭuvār koṇṭu viṭṭa nilattukku Etta Iṟaippaṟṟilak kūttāṇṭai ceṟu
veṉṟu pokaviṭṭapaṭi nilattukku Āḷuṭaiya piḷḷaiyār tevatāṉam Atticceṟuvu
kku meṟkum tevatāṉa puṟavaṭaikku vaṭakkum tevatāṉamum matuḷukkum kiḻakkum kiḻak
ku nokkip pokiṟa kaṇṇikkālukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa kuḻi Aiññū
ṟṟu Eḻupattaiñcum teṉvaṭakku puṟavaṭai nātiyār Eṉṟu perk kūvappaṭṭa nilattuk
ku tevatāṉam puñcai nilattukku meṟkum kaṇṇikkālukku vaṭakkum matuḷukkuk kiḻakkum tiruṉanta
vaṉattukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Aṟupattāṟum Iṅkuviṭṭutteṟku
ṟaiyeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku tiruvālaṉtuṟaikku meṟkkum tiruvā
laṉtuṟai kuṇṭilukku vaṭakkum tevatāṉam ṉa vatikku kiḻakkum tevatāṉa kaik vaṭakkum
Itu Iṉṉāṉ kellaikku(kku) Uṭpaṭṭa nūṟṟuaimpatukkum Āka kuḻi Āyiramum Iṟṟai nāḷāl vi
ṟṟukkuṭukka koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaṇam muppa
ttaiñcum kaikkoṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku
tirunāma ṉṉilattāl varum cakalappirāttikaḷum Uḷppa
kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Ivai nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ
Aruṇakiri paṭ ḻu ttu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.414 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
